£225m available through Capital Grants from July 2026 to fund environmental improvements—hedgerow planting, trees, water quality works and more. Full eligible items list drops in May. Get ahead: https://defrafarming.blog.gov.uk/2026/03/19/the-2026-capital-grants-offer/

£50 million available in FETF 2026 grants—applications open now for equipment and technology across productivity, animal health, and slurry management. 290 eligible items listed, including heat lamps for lambs. Apply via Defra Farming.

Middle East tensions are pushing UK political leadership to prioritize domestic food production. Conservative Party Leader Kemi Badenoch has told Farmers Guardian that conflict should be a "wake up call" for Government backing of British farming—a signal that food security is moving up the agenda. Read the full statement here: https://www.farmersguardian.com/news/4527362/iran-war-kemi-badenoch-grow-food
